topic: A bathtub fills itself with warm water every night.
title: My Bathtub Fills With Warm Water By Itself Every Night | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My bathtub fills with warm water by itself every single night.
scenes.image_prompt: a white bathtub full of still water in a dim bathroom, faint steam rising, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It is an old apartment, with an old clawfoot tub.
scenes.image_prompt: a vintage clawfoot bathtub in a small tiled bathroom, dim overhead light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
a close framed old bathtub faucet with a single drop falling, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The first night I found it full, I assumed I had forgotten.
scenes.image_prompt: a bathtub brimming with water, soft reflection of bathroom light, deep shadow corners, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But the water was warm. I had been asleep for hours.
scenes.image_prompt: steam curling above still bathwater in a dark bathroom, faint glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: So I shut the valve under the sink completely.
scenes.image_prompt: a hand turning a shutoff valve under a bathroom sink, dim flashlight beam, shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The next morning the tub was full again, and warmer.
scenes.image_prompt: a full bathtub with heavy steam in a cold tiled room, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every night it filled. Every night the water held the same heat.
scenes.image_prompt: still warm bathwater reflecting a faint ceiling light, dark bathroom, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then I noticed the water was always slightly lower than I left it.
scenes.image_prompt: a bathtub of water with a faint waterline mark on the porcelain, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: As if, just before I woke, someone had climbed out.
scenes.image_prompt: wet footprints leading away from a full bathtub across a tiled floor, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I keep the bathroom door locked now. It does not help.
scenes.image_prompt: a locked bathroom door from the hallway, faint light at the floor gap, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night the water was cold, and someone had folded a towel for me.
scenes.image_prompt: a neatly folded towel resting on the edge of a full bathtub, dim light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
